issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. This is a static conditional power boost, not an event trigger. Should use 'Always' or similar passive trigger.
Action type 'KO' is completely wrong. Card grants a power boost (+1000 power), not KO effect. Should be 'PowerBoost'.
Missing condition entirely. Card requires 'your Life cards ≤ opponent's Life cards' condition to activate the power boost.
Target scope is wrong. Power boost applies to 'this Character' (self), not opponent character selection.
